title: Yes I did.
content:
Yes I did.







Act II Summary

The house is slowly cooking, slowly running out of oxygen, which is what inclines them to play along at least in the beginning
We switch to a feed inside the PRODUCER’s studio. We overhear an internal fight. This drama unfolds in rapid bursts. We learn that someone is unraveling the terrorist organization from the inside. A disagreement of ideologies. A passing down from generation to generation going wrong. A matriarchy, passing down from mother to daughter, one new woman (as does the daughter) thinks its unfair.
Husband and wife are forced into their bedroom and forced to watch their kids battle one nother. Are they forced to have sex? Fre and Li must be humiliated publicly. Publicly deformed. First they watch their kids, then its revealead that Li is working for them, then they humiliate one another? Fre sacrifices himself momentarily before finding out that Li has turned.
Rok and Sus in their individual bedrooms. They are played against one another like the Joker Ferry Situation.
